title: Masterplug TAUSBEUR2-MP UK to Europe USB Travel Adaptor, White
features: ELIMINATE THE PROBLEM OF USING AN ELECTRICAL POWER APPLICATION WHEN VISITING EUROPE: With this single socket travel adaptor with two USB ports from Masterplug at Luceco

TRUST IN THE 'SMART' USB FEATURES: Which standby once your device has fully charged and it can also auto detect your USB device and adjust its charging pattern - making it suitable for iPhone and android appliances
WITH A SMALL AND COMPACT DESIGN: The gloss white travel adaptor measures 79 x 68.5 x 65 mm and adapts your 3-pin UK mains plugs to fit into 2-pin European sockets
description: From the manufacturer Masterplug Single Socket Travel Adaptor with Two USB Ports, 79 x 68.5 x 65 mm, White Charge and power your portable devices wherever you go in the world This European travel adaptor from Masterplug at Luceco is the convenient travel accompaniment you want to take along to trips and holidays to Europe. With a single socket for charging and powering electrical devices as well as two USB charging ports for mobile devices. More Information UK to EU adaptor Two USB ports White Smart USB feature The 'Smart' USB feature goes into standby mode once your mobile device has fully charged and it can also auto detect your USB device and adjust its charging pattern - making it suitable for iPhone and android appliances. The two USB charging ports also means that the single socket is spare to charge other electrical devices. Masterplug Set of 2 Travel Adaptors, UK to Global Use, White with Clear Case Masterplug Universal to UK Travel Adaptor, 59 x 55 x 51.2 mm, White Masterplug Single Socket Travel Adaptor with Two USB Ports, 79 x 68.5 x 65 mm Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews — — 4.2 out of 5 stars 122 Price — no data — no data £9.99 £ 9 . 99 About Masterplug With over 75 years experience, the Luceco plc brands of Luceco LED lighting, BG Electrical, Masterplug and Ross are market leaders in key electrical categories, offering a "one stop shop" for trade and retail accessories. Masterplug is one of the most recognisable brands in the world and has been at the forefront of Portable Power for many decades. With a head office in London and global offices in four continents, Luceco has an impressive portfolio of over 2,500 product lines and are continually evolving product ranges, aligned to market trends. So, whether you’re looking for the best in LED lighting, top of the range extension leads, stylish socket covers or dimmer switches, Luceco is the brand that you can trust to deliver on quality production and performance.
